summary: Completed testing of withdrawable balance feature (iteration 21). All 7 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - wallet page shows correct balances (NOT zeros), new 'Withdrawable (Winnings)' card in cyan, withdrawal form shows winnings-only limit, all tabs load correctly. Admin withdrawals page working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Withdrawable balance feature fully tested. Key findings: (1) GET /api/wallet now returns withdrawable_balance and total_winnings fields. (2) GET /api/transactions/my endpoint exists and returns user transactions (this was the missing endpoint causing the zero-balance bug). (3) POST /api/withdrawals validates against withdrawable_balance and returns 'Only winning amounts can be withdrawn' error if exceeded. (4) Frontend uses Promise.allSettled instead of Promise.all to prevent silent failures. (5) Wallet card grid now has 5 columns with 'Withdrawable (Winnings)' in cyan. (6) Withdrawal form shows 'Withdrawable (Winnings only)' limit. (7) User balance: 68508.50, withdrawable: 33925.70, total_winnings: 37525.70.

wallet_withdrawable_balance_field.details: GET /api/wallet returns withdrawable_balance and total_winnings fields

transactions_my_endpoint.details: GET /api/transactions/my returns user transactions (previously missing endpoint)

withdrawal_validation.details: POST /api/withdrawals validates against withdrawable_balance, returns 'Only winning amounts can be withdrawn' error

admin_withdrawals.details: GET /api/admin/withdrawals returns all withdrawals with username

frontend_wallet_page.details: Wallet page shows correct balances (NOT zeros), 5 columns including Withdrawable (Winnings) in cyan

frontend_transactions_tab.details: All Transactions tab loads correctly with 47 records

frontend_admin_withdrawals.details: Admin withdrawals page shows stats, filters, withdrawal cards with approve/reject buttons

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints use real data from MongoDB

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/wallet_page_test.png - User wallet page with 5 balance cards including Withdrawable (Winnings)
.screenshots/withdrawal_form.png - Withdrawal form showing Winnings only limit
.screenshots/admin_withdrawals_page.png - Admin withdrawals with stats and pending requests

zero_balance_bug.root_cause: /api/transactions/my endpoint was missing, causing Promise.all to fail silently
zero_balance_bug.fix: Added /api/transactions/my endpoint and changed Promise.all to Promise.allSettled in frontend

withdrawable_balance_feature.details: Users can only withdraw winning amounts. withdrawable_balance = total_winnings - total_withdrawn - pending_withdrawals
